subcodes.first_line: Although the cosmic realities universally manifest the divine signs, yet [they receive] the nobility of honor and the distinction of a universal bestowal [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حقائق کونیه عموما مظهر ایات الهیه ایسه ده انجق شرف کرامت و منقبت موهبت کلیه
subcodes.subjects: @the human soul at midpoint of creation; the isthmus [barzakh], @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @man's distinction from the animal, @spiritual transformation
